title: About SiteFlow ERP | Construction Management Software
metaTitle: About SiteFlow ERP | Construction Management Software
metaDescription: SiteFlow is a powerful construction management software built for contractors and builders to manage sites, track progress, control costs, and automate operations—all in one place.
author: SiteFlow Operations Team

STORY
SCROLL FIX: ::before dot replaced with explicit HTML element
Our Story
2021
How SiteFlow Construction ERP Was Founded
Founded in India. Built for contractors everywhere.
SiteFlow (legally SiteFlow ERP) is a construction ERP software company founded in 2021. We observed that Indian construction contractors were managing crore-value projects on WhatsApp groups and paper registers — not from lack of discipline, but from lack of tools built for how they actually work.
Every construction ERP they tried was built for manufacturing or a Western market. The language didn’t match. The workflows didn’t match. The pricing assumed an IT department — which no contractor has. So most gave up and went back to Excel.
“The problem wasn’t that contractors lacked discipline. The problem was that the tools available were designed for someone else. We set out to build the construction management software that should have existed.”
We spent months on actual project sites before writing a line of code. We watched material management happen on paper. We watched labour attendance tracked in registers that got lost. We saw billing disputes happen because there was no single source of truth for subcontractor billing.
Today, SiteFlow is trusted by 500+ construction companies across India and the Middle East. We are headquartered in Delhi, India and serve clients in UAE, Qatar, and Saudi Arabia.

Who We Serve
Construction Companies That Use SiteFlow ERP Software
From residential builders managing 5 units to EPC companies running ₹500 crore infrastructure projects.
🏘
Builders & Developers
End-to-end construction ERP for builders — BOQ, procurement, progress, and billing from planning to handover.
⚙
EPC & Infra Contractors
Multi-site visibility, BOQ tracking, subcontractor management, and daily progress reporting for large infrastructure projects.
🏗
Civil Contractors
Civil contractor software with material management, GPS attendance, quality checklists, and real-time cost tracking.
🏭
MSME Construction Firms
WhatsApp-first workflows that don’t require an IT team. Go live in a day, not a quarter.
🌎
Middle East Projects
Multi-currency, multi-site support for Indian contractors in UAE, Qatar, and Saudi Arabia.
🏢
Interior Companies
Interior design ERP — scope management, client selection tracking, vendor billing, and project P&L.
VALUES
What We Stand For
Our Principles as a Construction Software Company
Not wall-poster values — the actual filters we use when building features, pricing the product, and hiring people.
01
Site-First Thinking
Every feature is designed for the person on the construction site. If a site engineer can’t use it on a dusty Android phone, we haven’t done our job.
02
Zero Cost Leakage
The average Indian construction project loses 15–20% to overruns and wastage. SiteFlow exists to make every rupee visible, tracked, and accountable.
03
WhatsApp-First Operations
Indian construction runs on WhatsApp. We built around that reality. Approvals, alerts, and updates work where your team already works.
04
Transparent Pricing
No hidden fees. No per-module charges. No “contact sales” games. You sign up, you get the full platform — nothing locked away.
05
Shaped by Real Clients
Our 500+ client WhatsApp groups are also our product team. Every major feature has a contractor’s name behind the request that triggered it.
06
Built to Scale With You
Whether you’re managing 2 sites today or 50 tomorrow, SiteFlow scales without a new contract or implementation cycle.
Explore our modules: Project Planning  ·  Labour Management  ·  Procurement  ·  Finance & Billing  ·  Pricing
LEFT: Text + pills
How We Build
How We Build Our Construction Management Software
Feature requests come daily from 500+ client WhatsApp groups, renewal conversations, and onboarding calls. Our product team reviews them weekly and ships what matters most.
WhatsApp Feedback Onboarding Insights Renewal Conversations Site Visits AI Call Analysis
RIGHT: 4 steps
1
Idea From the Field
A client WhatsApp group or support call flags a real friction point on site.
2
Product Team Review
We check frequency and impact — how many clients face this, and how much does it cost them?
3
Prototype & Feedback Loop
A working build is shared with the clients who raised it. They test, we refine.
4
Release & Onboard
Shipped with a walkthrough video and live support for the first users.
LEFT: Why cards
Why SiteFlow
Why Contractors Choose SiteFlow Over Other Construction ERP Software
📱
WhatsApp-Native Notifications
Attendance alerts, approvals, billing summaries — delivered to WhatsApp so your team doesn’t need another app.
🔗
Tally & Zoho Books Integration
Finance stays on Tally. Site uses SiteFlow. POs, invoices, and payments sync both ways — zero double entry.
📍
GPS & Face Recognition Attendance
Geo-tagged clock-ins and face scans ensure accurate labour records even on remote sites.
📊
Real-Time Project P&L
Actual vs budgeted costs — by project, by cost head, by contractor. No month-end surprises.
🤖
AI-Powered DPR Generation
Daily Progress Reports generated from site inputs automatically, with AI suggestions on delays.
🚀
Live in 1 Day
Dedicated onboarding managers load your material library, BOQs, and party master so you’re operational immediately.

LEFT
Innovation
AI and Automation Features in SiteFlow Construction Software
Construction hasn’t fundamentally changed how it runs in 40 years. SiteFlow is changing that — with tools that solve real problems, not just demo well.
AI-Powered Drawing Analysis
Upload architectural drawings and extract BOQ quantities automatically — cutting estimation from days to hours.
WhatsApp-First Field Operations
Attendance, material indents, DPR entries, and approvals — without a separate app download.
Two-Way Accounting Sync
Real-time two-way sync with Tally ERP and Zoho Books. POs, bills, and payments flow automatically.
Smart Material Intelligence
Track procurement rate trends, flag unusual purchases, and get reorder suggestions based on project progress.
RIGHT: Dark visual card
500+

LEFT
Support & Partnership
SiteFlow ERP Onboarding and Customer Support
Our onboarding team loads your data, trains your team, and stays available through the first 30 days.
🧑‍🏫
Dedicated Onboarding Manager
Every client gets a named manager who loads material library, BOQs, and party master data before go-live.
💬
WhatsApp Support — Always On
Question during bill finalization at 9 PM? Our team is reachable, not just in business hours.
📹
Module-Wise Training Videos
Short practical tutorials for every module in Hindi and English. Learn at your own pace.
🔄
Proactive Renewal Check-ins
Our team checks in 60 days before renewal — not to upsell, but to make sure you’re getting full value.
RIGHT: Trust card

FAQ
FAQ
Frequently Asked Questions About SiteFlow Construction ERP Software
SiteFlow is built for construction companies in India and the Middle East — civil contractors, EPC firms, builders and developers, interior companies, and infrastructure companies. Our typical client manages ₹5–₹500 crore annually with 10–200 people.
Most clients go live within 1–3 days. Our onboarding managers load your material library, rate library, party master, and BOQ files. We’ve done this across 500+ onboardings — no IT team needed.
Yes — two-way integration with Tally ERP and Zoho Books. Purchase orders, vendor invoices, and client receipts sync automatically. GST ledgers, cost centre mapping, and narration formats are all configured to match your existing Tally setup.
SiteFlow uses the official WhatsApp Business API. Attendance alerts, material approvals, billing summaries, and project updates land in WhatsApp — so your site engineers don’t need a separate app. We also use Periskope to manage 500+ client group notifications at scale.
Annual subscription pricing. No setup fees, no per-module charges, no implementation costs. Onboarding, training, and WhatsApp support are included. See our pricing page or book a demo for a custom quote.
Yes. SiteFlow is designed for multi-project, multi-site operations. Consolidated P&L, shared material libraries, and cross-project reporting are standard — not premium add-ons.
Site engineers who’ve never used an ERP are entering DPRs in SiteFlow within their first week. The mobile app is optimised for on-site use with minimal taps and offline capability. We provide module-wise tutorials in Hindi and English, and your onboarding manager stays reachable for 30 days.
FINAL CTA
See SiteFlow Construction ERP in Action
Book a free demo and see how 500+ contractors across India and the Middle East manage their projects, procurement, labour, and billing on one platform.
